Research in NLP, Robust Language Modeling, LLM and Model Safety, Low Ressource Languages and Specialized domains

Parsiti / NArabizi

The original site linked this work to research on noisy and low-resource language processing, especially North-African Arabizi and associated resources.

Related content in the archive includes publications and dataset references connected to the NArabizi Treebank and multilingual transfer for dialectal or non-canonical language settings.

© Djamé Seddah — 2026 · Last updated: April 2026
